title: Learn 80% of Claude Cowork in Under 20 Minutes
summary: Claude Cowork is Anthropic's desktop app that extends Claude from a chatbot into a productivity system. It enables local file access, persistent memory, tool connectors, custom skills, project organization, browser extension integration, and scheduled task automation.
